description: A new annual contract has been signed with a major customer, requiring an update to their special pricing for several products.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's current pricing agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the existing price list for the customer.

nodes.task_description: Enter the new, lower prices for the three products covered by the new contract.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the prices for the specified products.

nodes.task_description: Set the effective date for the new pricing to the start of the next month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the start date for the new price list.
